fields.name: START
fields.description: Start This bit start or stop the encoding or decoding process. Note: Reads always return 0.

fields.name: NF
fields.description: Number of color components This field defines the number of color components minus 1.

fields.name: DE
fields.description: Codec operation as coder or decoder This bit selects the code or decode process

fields.name: COLSPACE
fields.description: Color space This filed defines the number of quantization tables minus 1 to insert in the output stream.

fields.name: NS
fields.description: Number of components for scan This field defines the number of components minus 1 for scan header marker segment.

fields.name: HDR
fields.description: Header processing This bit enables the header processing (generation/parsing).

fields.name: YSIZE
fields.description: Y Size This field defines the number of lines in source image.

fields.name: NMCU
fields.description: Number of MCUs For encoding: this field defines the number of MCU units minus 1 to encode. For decoding: this field indicates the number of complete MCU units minus 1 to be decoded (this field is updated after the JPEG header parsing). If the decoded image size has not a X or Y size multiple of 8 or 16 (depending on the sub-sampling process), the resulting incomplete or empty MCU must be added to this value to get the total number of MCUs generated.

fields.name: XSIZE
fields.description: X size This field defines the number of pixels per line.

fields.name: HD
fields.description: Huffman DC Selects the Huffman table for encoding DC coefficients.

fields.name: HA
fields.description: Huffman AC Selects the Huffman table for encoding AC coefficients.

fields.name: QT
fields.description: Quantization table Selects quantization table used for component 0.

fields.name: NB
fields.description: Number of blocks Number of data units minus 1 that belong to a particular color in the MCU.

fields.name: VSF
fields.description: Vertical sampling factor Vertical sampling factor for component 0.

fields.name: HSF
fields.description: Horizontal sampling factor Horizontal sampling factor for component 0.

fields.name: HD
fields.description: Huffman DC Selects the Huffman table for encoding DC coefficients.

fields.name: HA
fields.description: Huffman AC Selects the Huffman table for encoding AC coefficients.

fields.name: QT
fields.description: Quantization table Selects quantization table used for component 1.

fields.name: NB
fields.description: Number of blocks Number of data units minus 1 that belong to a particular color in the MCU.

fields.name: VSF
fields.description: Vertical sampling factor Vertical sampling factor for component 1.

fields.name: HSF
fields.description: Horizontal sampling factor Horizontal sampling factor for component 1.

fields.name: HD
fields.description: Huffman DC Selects the Huffman table for encoding DC coefficients.

fields.name: HA
fields.description: Huffman AC Selects the Huffman table for encoding AC coefficients.

fields.name: QT
fields.description: Quantization table Selects quantization table used for component 2.

fields.name: NB
fields.description: Number of blocks Number of data units minus 1 that belong to a particular color in the MCU.

fields.name: VSF
fields.description: Vertical sampling factor Vertical sampling factor for component 2.

fields.name: HSF
fields.description: Horizontal sampling factor Horizontal sampling factor for component 2.

fields.name: HD
fields.description: Huffman DC Selects the Huffman table for encoding DC coefficients.

fields.name: HA
fields.description: Huffman AC Selects the Huffman table for encoding AC coefficients.

fields.name: QT
fields.description: Quantization table Selects quantization table used for component 3.

fields.name: NB
fields.description: Number of blocks Number of data units minus 1 that belong to a particular color in the MCU.

fields.name: VSF
fields.description: Vertical sampling factor Vertical sampling factor for component 3.

fields.name: HSF
fields.description: Horizontal sampling factor Horizontal sampling factor for component 3.

fields.name: JCEN
fields.description: JPEG core enable This bit enables the JPEG codec core.

fields.name: IFTIE
fields.description: Input FIFO threshold interrupt enable This bit enables interrupt generation when the input FIFO reaches a threshold.

fields.name: IFNFIE
fields.description: Input FIFO not full interrupt enable This bit enables interrupt generation when the input FIFO is not empty.

fields.name: OFTIE
fields.description: Output FIFO threshold interrupt enable This bit enables interrupt generation when the output FIFO reaches a threshold.

fields.name: OFNEIE
fields.description: Output FIFO not empty interrupt enable This bit enables interrupt generation when the output FIFO is not empty.

fields.name: EOCIE
fields.description: End of conversion interrupt enable This bit enables interrupt generation at the end of conversion.

fields.name: HPDIE
fields.description: Header parsing done interrupt enable This bit enables interrupt generation upon the completion of the header parsing operation.

fields.name: IDMAEN
fields.description: Input DMA enable Enables DMA request generation for the input FIFO.

fields.name: ODMAEN
fields.description: Output DMA enable Enables DMA request generation for the output FIFO.

fields.name: IFF
fields.description: Input FIFO flush This bit flushes the input FIFO. Note: Reads always return 0.

fields.name: OFF
fields.description: Output FIFO flush This bit flushes the output FIFO. Note: Reads always return 0.

fields.name: IFTF
fields.description: Input FIFO threshold flag This bit flags that the amount of data in the input FIFO is below a threshold. This flag must not be considered when using DMA.

fields.name: IFNFF
fields.description: Input FIFO not full flag This bit flags that the input FIFO is not full (data can be written). This flag must not be considered when using DMA.

fields.name: OFTF
fields.description: Output FIFO threshold flag This bit flags that the amount of data in the output FIFO reaches or exceeds a threshold. This flag must not be considered when using DMA.

fields.name: OFNEF
fields.description: Output FIFO not empty flag This bit flags that data is available in the output FIFO. This flag must not be considered when using DMA.

fields.name: EOCF
fields.description: End of conversion flag This bit flags the completion of encode/decode process and data transfer to the output FIFO.

fields.name: HPDF
fields.description: Header parsing done flag In decode mode, this bit flags the completion of header parsing and updating internal registers.

fields.name: COF
fields.description: Codec operation flag This bit flags code/decode operation in progress.

fields.name: CEOCF
fields.description: Clear end of conversion flag Writing 1 clears the ECF bit of the JPEG_SR register.

fields.name: CHPDF
fields.description: Clear header parsing done flag Writing 1 clears the HPDF bit of the JPEG_SR register.

fields.name: DATAIN
fields.description: Data input FIFO Input FIFO data register

fields.name: DATAOUT
fields.description: Data output FIFO Output FIFO data register.

fields.name: QCOEF0
fields.description: Quantization coefficient 0 8-bit quantization coefficient.

fields.name: QCOEF1
fields.description: Quantization coefficient 1 8-bit quantization coefficient.

fields.name: QCOEF2
fields.description: Quantization coefficient 2 8-bit quantization coefficient.

fields.name: QCOEF3
fields.description: Quantization coefficient 3 8-bit quantization coefficient.

fields.name: QCOEF0
fields.description: Quantization coefficient 0 8-bit quantization coefficient.

fields.name: QCOEF1
fields.description: Quantization coefficient 1 8-bit quantization coefficient.

fields.name: QCOEF2
fields.description: Quantization coefficient 2 8-bit quantization coefficient.

fields.name: QCOEF3
fields.description: Quantization coefficient 3 8-bit quantization coefficient.

fields.name: QCOEF2

fields.name: QCOEF3

fields.name: DATA0
fields.description: Data 0 Base Huffman value.

fields.name: DATA1
fields.description: Data 1 Base Huffman value.

fields.name: DATA0
fields.description: Data 0 Huffman symbol.

fields.name: DATA1
fields.description: Data 1 Huffman symbol.

fields.name: DATA2
fields.description: Data 2 Huffman symbol.

fields.name: DATA3
fields.description: Data 3 Huffman symbol.

fields.name: DATA0
fields.description: Huffman table data 0 Huffman table data for DHT marker segment generation.

fields.name: DATA1
fields.description: Huffman table data 1 Huffman table data for DHT marker segment generation.

fields.name: DATA2
fields.description: Huffman table data 2 Huffman table data for DHT marker segment generation.

fields.name: DATA3
fields.description: Huffman table data 3 Huffman table data for DHT marker segment generation.

fields.name: HCODE0
fields.description: Huffman code 0 8 least significant bits of the Huffman code. If the Huffman code is less than 8 bits long, the unused bits must be 0.

fields.name: HLEN0
fields.description: Huffman length 0 Number of bits in the Huffman code HCODE0 minus 1.

fields.name: HCODE1
fields.description: Huffman code 1 8 least significant bits of the Huffman code. If the Huffman code is less than 8 bits long, the unused bits must be 0.

fields.name: HLEN1
fields.description: Huffman length 1 Number of bits in the Huffman code HCODE1 minus 1.
